revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:陵墓参考地]][[zh:陵墓參考地]]
'''Ryoho Sankochi''' (陵墓参考地) refers to tombs managed by the {{ill|Imperial Household Agency|en|Imperial Household Agency|qid=Q1143602|lt=Imperial Household Agency|1=Imperial Household Agency}} that are not definitively identified as Imperial mausolea but are deemed highly likely to be so based on historical evidence. These sites originated in 1882 as "designated mausoleum prospects" (御陵墓見込地){{sfn|Sotoike Noboru|2005|11=62-69}}. As of March 1993, there are 46 such sites{{sfn|Sotoike Noboru|2005|11=70-71}}. While entry to these sites is restricted like mausolea, they are not used for rituals{{sfn|Sotoike Noboru|2005|11=62-69}}.
This article also discusses the historical categories preceding Ryoho Sankochi: "designated mausoleum prospects" (御陵墓見込地), "legendary mausoleum sites" (御陵墓伝説地), and "referential legendary mausoleum sites" (御陵墓伝説参考地).
== External Links == * {{Commonscat|Japanese imperial mausolea (unspecified)}} * {{ill|Japanese imperial tombs|en|Japanese imperial tombs|qid=Q17218816|lt=Japanese imperial tombs|1=Japanese imperial tombs}} * {{ill|Confucian royal ancestral shrine|en|Confucian royal ancestral shrine|qid=Q10948212|lt=Confucian royal ancestral shrine|1=Confucian royal ancestral shrine}} {{translated page|ja|陵墓参考地|version=103168791|comment=Imported full ja history}}
<!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum--><!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum--><!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum--><!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum--><!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum--><!--Candidate Imperial Mausoleum-->
